work experience

Recent roles focused on product UI and frontend systems.

Project Manager · Robertsfors Municipality, Robertsfors

Aug 2022 – Sep 2023

  • Worked with newly arrived foreign-born participants and provided guidance on the labor market and social studies.
  • Organized study visits and internships for participants.
  • Followed up with employers on intern progress.

Project Manager · Robertsfors Municipality, Robertsfors

Mar 2018 – Dec 2019

  • Assisted job seekers with job search preparation (CVs, personal letters).
  • Found internship placements and organized employer site visits.
  • Provided language support at employer/employee information meetings.

Assistant · Swedish Public Employment Service, Robertsfors

Jun 2017 – Mar 2018

  • General office work and communicated new rules/changes to participants in the establishment program.
  • Language support for caseworkers during meetings and registrations.
  • Follow-ups with employers and employees after hires or internships.

Project Incharge · Al Marai Company (IPNC Dept.), Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

Sep 2012 – Apr 2014

  • Led a newly launched project in collaboration with Mead Johnson (USA).
  • Coordinated five medical representatives and 66 sales supervisors in the northwest region.
  • Monitored inventory, sales, and deliveries to hospitals, pharmacies, and supermarkets.
  • Conducted regular visits and checks of regional depots and customers to ensure availability and satisfaction.

Sales Supervisor & Acting Sales Manager · Al Marai Company (Dairy Dept.), Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

Jan 2008 – Sep 2012

  • Led a sales team of 22 sellers and assistants.
  • Delivered company targets, trained staff, and maintained distribution plans.
  • Managed budgets and ensured market needs through regular customer visits.
  • Coordinated five sales leaders and monitored daily sales performance.
  • Followed up on daily and weekly targets to support team performance.

Key Account Manager / Sales · Al Marai Company (Dairy Dept.), Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

May 2005 – Dec 2007

  • Forecasted and ordered products according to market demand and climate conditions.
  • Distributed and delivered dairy products based on market needs.
  • Collected payments and assessed customer satisfaction per company policy.
  • Ensured product availability and compliance with cold-chain and quality policies.

Marketing & Team Lead · Salim Mohammed Bakhashwen & Sons (SEB & TEFAL Group), Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

Mar 2000 – Dec 2004

  • Arranged marketing activities and collected orders and payments from key retailers.
  • Coordinated delivery of kitchenware to company-owned stores and external clients.
  • Ensured products were displayed in an attractive, sellable way in stores.
